summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Google Cloud Translation API integration with bilingual labels and verification system. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend translation features working correctly including language selector, bilingual display, Gold badges for community verified translations, sparkle icons for AI-generated translations, and language persistence (after fix).
passed_tests: Language selector works: English, Hindi, Marathi options all present
Bilingual display: Items show 'English / Translation' format correctly
AI Translation indicator: Sparkle icons visible for pending translations
Community Verified badge (Gold): Shows for pre-verified static translations
Translation API endpoint works: POST /api/translate returns correct translations
Verify endpoint works: POST /api/translate/verify increments verification count
Edit endpoint works: POST /api/translate/edit saves custom labels (Dadi Override)
Static translations (Rice, Potato, etc.) marked as community verified
AI-generated translations (quinoa, avocado) marked with is_ai_generated=true
Multi-language translation (Hindi + Marathi) works in single request
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: DualContextHeader was not reading language from localStorage on initial render - now initializes from localStorage.getItem('rasoi_language')
seed_data_creation: None - used existing inventory and shopping data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation system fully tested. Key components: 1) TranslatedLabel component handles bilingual display with verification UI, 2) LanguageContext provides app-wide language state, 3) DualContextHeader has language selector that persists to localStorage, 4) Backend has /api/translate, /api/translate/verify, /api/translate/edit endpoints. Static translations for common ingredients are pre-verified (Gold badge), new translations from Google API are marked as AI-generated (sparkle icon). The fix applied: DualContextHeader now reads initial language from localStorage.

mocked_apis.note: Google Translate API is LIVE - using real API key AIzaSyA3FWsJ4zdvXIm34KN3nWZKfDzsGnXc6FY

features_verified.ai_translation_indicator: Working - Sparkle icon for pending translations
features_verified.verify_button: Working - Checkmark button marks translation as correct
features_verified.edit_translation: Working - Click on translation text to edit (Dadi Override)
